info.name: Meal Hisab
info.description:
Postman collection for the Meal Hisab multi-tenant backend.

**Auth**
- Phone + password login
- Bearer token at collection level (`{{accessToken}}`)

**Tenant identification**
- Every mess-scoped endpoint requires header: `X-MessID: {{messId}}`
- Mess id is **not** sent in the URL — only in the `X-MessID` header
- The collection pre-request script auto-attaches this header for tenant routes under `/messes/...` (excluding list/create)
- Run **Create Mess** first — it saves `{{messId}}` automatically
- Use the **Tenant Identification** folder to verify guard behaviour (400/404 cases)

**One mess per user**
- A user may belong to only one mess at a time (OWNER, MANAGER, or MEMBER).
- Leave the current mess (`POST /messes/leave`) before creating or joining another.
- Owners must transfer ownership before leaving.
- Super admins are exempt from the one-mess rule.

**Endpoint map (tenant routes)**
- Mess: `/messes/current`, `/messes/stats`
- Members: `/messes/members`, `/messes/leave`, `/messes/transfer-ownership`
- Meals: `/messes/meals/daily`, `/messes/meals/summary`, `/messes/meals`, `/messes/meals/:mealEntryId`
- Bazaar: `/messes/bazaar`, `/messes/bazaar/:bazaarId`
- Payments: `/messes/payments`, `/messes/payments/:paymentId`
- Expenses: `/messes/expenses`, `/messes/expenses/:expenseId`
- Reports: `/messes/reports/meal-rate`, `/messes/reports/members`, `/messes/reports/member-ledger/:memberId`
- Monthly closings: `/messes/monthly-closings`, `/messes/monthly-closings/:closingId`

**Workflow**
1. Register or Login
2. Create Mess → sets `{{messId}}`
3. Call tenant endpoints (Member, Meals, Bazaar, Payments, etc.)

item.name: Auth

exec: // Save token + user to collection variables for downstream requests
console.log('[Register] accessToken saved to collection variables');

request.description:
Create a new user account with phone + password.

**Body**
- `name` (string, required) — 2..80 chars
- `phone` (string, required) — Bangladeshi mobile (e.g. `017XXXXXXXX`, `+88017XXXXXXXX`, `88017XXXXXXXX`)
- `password` (string, required) — 6..72 chars
- `avatarUrl` (string, optional) — valid URL

On success, saves `accessToken`, `userId`, `userName`, `userPhone` into collection variables automatically.

exec: // Post-login script: persist token + user to collection variables
console.log('No membership found. Old messId cleared.');
console.log('[Login] accessToken saved to collection variables');

request.description:
Authenticate a user with phone + password.

**Body**
- `phone` (string, required) — Bangladeshi mobile
- `password` (string, required)

On success, saves `accessToken`, `userId`, `userName`, `userPhone` into collection variables automatically.

exec: console.log('No membership found. Old messId cleared.');

request.description:
Get the currently authenticated user, including their mess memberships and any messes they own.

Requires `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}` (inherited from collection).

exec: // Keep cached userName in sync for downstream requests
console.log('[UpdateProfile] userName synced to collection variables');

request.description:
Update non-file profile fields for the authenticated user.

**Body** (at least one field required)
- `name` (string, optional) — 2..80 chars

Avatar uploads are handled by `PATCH /auth/avatar` (multipart) — `avatarUrl` is intentionally not accepted here.

exec: // Cache the latest avatar URL so other tooling can reference it
console.log('[UpdateAvatar] avatarUrl cached to collection variables');

formdata.description: Image file to upload as the user's avatar. Allowed: jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp, heic, heif, ico. Max size: 30 MB.

request.description:
Upload a new avatar for the authenticated user.

**Request**
- Content-Type: `multipart/form-data`
- Field `avatar` (file, required) — image (jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp, heic, heif, ico), up to 30 MB. HEIC/HEIF inputs are auto-converted to JPEG before upload.

**Behavior**
- Uploads the file to Cloudflare R2 under the `avatars/` folder.
- Creates an `Asset` row tied to the user (`type = AVATAR`).
- Atomically swaps the previous avatar `Asset` for the new one and best-effort deletes the old R2 object.

**Note:** Do **not** send a manual `Content-Type` header — Postman generates the correct `multipart/form-data; boundary=...` automatically when you attach a file.

exec: console.log('[DeleteAvatar] avatarUrl cleared from collection variables');

request.description:
Remove the authenticated user's avatar.

**Behavior**
- Clears `User.avatarUrl` and `User.avatarAssetId`.
- Deletes the underlying `Asset` row.
- Best-effort deletes the object from Cloudflare R2 (failures are logged but do not fail the request).

exec: // Rotate password vars so Login keeps working
console.log('[ChangePassword] testPassword and newPassword swapped for next runs');

request.description:
Change the authenticated user's password.

**Body**
- `currentPassword` (string, required)
- `newPassword` (string, required, 6..72, must differ from current)

On success, the collection swaps `testPassword` ↔ `newPassword` so the next `Login` works without manual edits.

exec: console.log('[Logout] cleared accessToken and cached user fields');

request.description: Logout the current session. With pure-JWT auth, the server simply clears any auth cookie; the client must also drop its in-memory/storage token. This request clears all cached auth state in the collection.

item.description: All authentication-related endpoints for the Meal Hisab backend.

item.name: Mess

exec: console.log('[CreateMess] messId saved to collection variables:', data.id);

request.description:
Create a new mess. The authenticated user automatically becomes the owner and is also registered as the first member of the mess.

**One mess per user:** Returns `409 Conflict` if you already belong to another mess. Leave first via **Leave Mess** (Member folder).

**Body**
- `name` (string, required) — 2..80 chars
- `address` (string, optional) — up to 255 chars
- `phone` (string, optional) — Bangladeshi mobile for the mess contact.

On success, saves `messId` and `messName` into collection variables.

header.description: Tenant identifier — required for all mess-scoped APIs

request.description:
**Endpoint**
- `GET /messes/stats`

Quick current-month summary for the mess dashboard:
- `activeMemberCount`
- `totalMeals` (sum of breakfast + lunch + dinner for the month)
- `totalBazaarCost`
- `totalExtraExpense`
- `totalPayments`
- `mealRate` = `totalBazaarCost / totalMeals` (0 when no meals)

For frozen monthly reports use the Monthly Closing module.

**Required tenant header**
- `X-MessID: {{messId}}` — required on every mess-scoped request. Set automatically from collection variables after **Create Mess**.

header.description: Tenant identifier — required for all mess-scoped APIs

request.description:
**Endpoint**
- `GET /messes/current`

Fetch a single mess by id, including the owner profile, the active member count, the caller's `isOwner` flag and `myRole`.

**Access**
- Owner of the mess, OR
- Any user with an `ACTIVE` membership in the mess.

**Required tenant header**
- `X-MessID: {{messId}}` — required on every mess-scoped request. Set automatically from collection variables after **Create Mess**.

header.description: Tenant identifier — required for all mess-scoped APIs

request.description:
**Endpoint**
- `PATCH /messes/current`

Update an existing mess.

**Body** (at least one field required)
- `name` (string, optional)
- `address` (string | null, optional) — pass `null` to clear
- `phone` (string | null, optional) — Bangladeshi mobile
- `isActive` (boolean, optional)

**Access**
- Mess owner, OR
- Active member with role `MANAGER`.

**Required tenant header**
- `X-MessID: {{messId}}` — required on every mess-scoped request. Set automatically from collection variables after **Create Mess**.

exec: console.log('[DeleteMess] messId cleared from collection variables');

header.description: Tenant identifier — required for all mess-scoped APIs

request.description:
**Endpoint**
- `DELETE /messes/current`

Hard-delete a mess.

Cascade rules on the schema clean up all related rows (members, meals, bazaar entries, expenses, payments, monthly closings).

**Access**
- Mess owner only — even a `MANAGER` member cannot delete the mess.

**Required tenant header**
- `X-MessID: {{messId}}` — required on every mess-scoped request. Set automatically from collection variables after **Create Mess**.

item.description:
Mess management endpoints.

**System-level (no X-MessID):**
- `POST /messes` — Create Mess

**Tenant-level (X-MessID required):**
- `GET /messes/current` — Get current mess
- `PATCH /messes/current` — Update current mess
- `DELETE /messes/current` — Delete current mess
- `GET /messes/stats` — Stats

Member-related endpoints (leave, transfer ownership, CRUD) live under the **Member** folder.

Run **Create Mess** first to populate `{{messId}}` used by the `X-MessID` header.

item.name: Member

header.description: Tenant identifier — required for all mess-scoped APIs

request.description:
**Endpoint:** `POST /messes/members`

Add a member profile to the mess.

**Access:** Owner or Manager only.

**Body**
- `fullName` (required)
- `phone` (optional) — auto-links to a platform user when the phone matches an active account
- `email`, `roomNo`, `joiningDate` (optional)
- `roleKey` — `MANAGER` or `MEMBER` only (`OWNER` is not allowed on create; use Transfer Ownership)

On success, saves `{{memberId}}`.

**Endpoint:** `GET /messes/members`

List members in the current mess. Any active mess member can call this.

**Endpoint:** `PATCH /messes/members/:memberId`

Update a member profile or role.

**Access:** Owner or Manager only.

**Body** (at least one field): `fullName`, `phone`, `email`, `roomNo`, `roleKey`, `status`, `joiningDate`, `leavingDate`.

Cannot deactivate the mess owner — transfer ownership first.

**Endpoint:** `DELETE /messes/members/:memberId`

Remove a member from the mess (sets status to `LEFT` and revokes app access).

**Access:** Owner or Manager only. Cannot remove the mess owner.

**Endpoint:** `PATCH /messes/transfer-ownership`

Transfer mess ownership to another member.

**Body:** `newOwnerMemberId` (required) — must be an active member with a linked app account.

**Behavior:** New owner gets OWNER role; previous owner becomes MANAGER.

**Access:** Mess owner only.

**Endpoint:** `POST /messes/leave`

Leave the current mess as the authenticated user.

Sets `MessUser` to `REMOVED` and linked `Member` to `LEFT`. Owners must transfer ownership first.

item.description:
Member and membership management.

**Member profiles** (`/messes/members`)
- Add, list, update, remove member profiles

**Membership actions**
- `POST /messes/leave` — leave the mess
- `PATCH /messes/transfer-ownership` — transfer owner role (`newOwnerMemberId`)

**Access:** Add/remove/update members require Owner or Manager.

item.name: Meals

query.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to today (UTC) when omitted.

request.description:
**Endpoint:** `GET /messes/meals/daily?date=YYYY-MM-DD`

Returns the daily meal sheet for all ACTIVE members (owner/manager) or only the caller's linked member profile (member role).

**Response:** `date`, `members[]` with meal counts, and `summary` totals.

**Access:** Any active mess member.

**Endpoint:** `PUT /messes/meals/daily`

Bulk upsert meal counts for a date. Rows with all zero counts and no note delete any existing entry.

**Access:** Owner or Manager only.

**Body:** `date` (YYYY-MM-DD), `entries[]` with `memberId`, `breakfast`, `lunch`, `dinner`, optional `note`.

**Endpoint:** `GET /messes/meals/summary?from=&to=`

Period totals with `byMember[]` and `byDate[]` breakdowns.

**Access:** Owner/Manager see all members; Member role sees only their own totals.

query.description: Optional for owner/manager. Member role is scoped to their own profile.

request.description:
**Endpoint:** `GET /messes/meals?from=&to=&memberId=`

Returns meal entries in a date range without pagination.

**Access:** Owner/Manager can filter by member; Member role sees only their own entries.

**Endpoint:** `PATCH /messes/meals/:mealEntryId`

Update one meal entry. Setting all counts to zero with no note deletes the row.

**Access:** Owner or Manager only.

**Endpoint:** `DELETE /messes/meals/:mealEntryId`

Delete a single meal entry.

**Access:** Owner or Manager only.

item.description:
Daily meal tracking for mess members.

**Routes**
- `GET /messes/meals/daily` — daily sheet
- `PUT /messes/meals/daily` — bulk upsert
- `GET /messes/meals/summary` — period totals
- `GET /messes/meals` — date range list
- `PATCH/DELETE /messes/meals/:mealEntryId` — single entry corrections

**Access:** Reads for any mess member (member role sees own data only). Writes require Owner or Manager.

exec: // Auto-attach X-MessID for tenant-scoped /messes/... routes (not list/create on /messes)
console.warn('[Tenant] X-MessID not set — run Create Mess first or set {{messId}}');
